text:
is a pamphlet sold in some Japanese cinemas when the Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time was released. It was created and sold by khara inc. on 08 March 2021 for 1,500 yen.

Overview

The pamphlet begins with a letter from Hideaki Anno for the film Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time through a series of screenshots. There are setteis presenting the characters, the Evangelions and the mechanics of the film. The booklet fearures interviews with the voice actors and two directors: Mahiro Maeda and Kazuya Tsurumaki.
